one_line_summary: Workflow-focused release checks for Godot 4 projects: exports, mobile readiness, localization, saves, visual regression, telemetry, and content validation.
repository_description: CI-friendly production diagnostics for Godot 4 projects.

tools.name: godot-project-doctor
tools.role: Umbrella CLI for package install guidance, planning, profile checklists, Markdown first-run plans, running, and summarizing the suite.

tools.name: godot-ci-doctor-action
tools.role: GitHub composite action wrapper for CI use.

tools.name: godot-asset-pipeline-doctor
tools.role: PNG and Godot .import checks for pixel art and mobile memory risks.

tools.name: godot-content-graph-doctor
tools.role: Data-driven content id, reference, and numeric outlier validation.

tools.name: godot-export-preset-doctor
tools.role: Release-readiness, target matrix, preset diff, leak-risk, and exported artifact checks.

tools.name: gdscript-api-comment-coverage
tools.role: Public GDScript API documentation and coverage gate.

tools.name: godot-gdscript-architecture-guard
tools.role: GDScript module boundary, module owner summary, autoload access, dependency graph, high fan-in/fan-out file, possible unused script, and architecture policy checks.

tools.name: godot-input-map-auditor
tools.role: Input coverage and duplicate binding checks.

tools.name: godot-localization-qa-guard
tools.role: CSV/PO translation checks, project key usage scan, and localization stress-pack generation.

tools.name: godot-save-schema-guard
tools.role: Save fixture generation, schema validation, migration-chain checks, before-and-after migration comparison, final migrated-output validation, and fixture redaction.

tools.name: godot-scenario-report-kit
tools.role: Scenario run evidence validation from JSON or JUnit XML, manifests, coverage checks, flake and retry grouping, evidence bundles, telemetry summaries, visual summaries, log summaries, and baseline comparison.

tools.name: godot-scene-signal-auditor
tools.role: Scene signal connection and autoload coupling analysis.

tools.name: godot-visual-smoke-test-kit
tools.role: Visual smoke plan, screenshot diff, and approval helpers.

tools.name: godot-mobile-perf-doctor
tools.role: Static mobile performance diagnostics for Godot projects.

tools.name: godot-mobile-ui-doctor
tools.role: Mobile UI metadata checks for safe areas, touch targets, spacing, text overflow, localized layout risk, and overlay previews.

tools.name: godot-pack-mod-doctor
tools.role: Pack, DLC, mod, and patch manifest generation, validation, moved-resource diffing, content-id, dependency, and load-order checks.

tools.name: godot-release-dashboard-kit
tools.role: Workflow-grouped static dashboard builder for toolkit reports, typed report highlights, visual artifacts, scenario evidence, retry evidence, export artifact evidence, report metadata, reproduction commands, compact telemetry summaries, and previous-run trends.

tools.name: godot-runtime-telemetry-lab
tools.role: Runtime telemetry adapters, summaries, timeline reports, named budgets, frame budget checks, and baseline comparisons.

tools.name: pixel-space-asset-toolkit
tools.role: Deterministic pixel sci-fi asset generation and cleanup utilities.

ci_and_maintenance.tests: unittest suites in every Python tool plus root project checks

current_limitations: Some specialized tools require project-specific fixtures or visual smoke capture scripts to be fully useful.
The tools are intentionally narrow and production-focused rather than a broad Godot framework.
The umbrella CLI is source-checkout first because the exact godot-project-doctor PyPI distribution name is already used by another project.
release_priorities: Maintain one public umbrella repository with all tools and the GitHub Action.
Keep tagged releases tied to passing CI runs.

Maintain the published packages first: godot-asset-pipeline-doctor, godot-export-preset-doctor, godot-mobile-perf-doctor, godot-content-graph-doctor, godot-scenario-report-kit, godot-gdscript-architecture-guard, godot-runtime-telemetry-lab, godot-pack-mod-doctor, and godot-release-dashboard-kit.
Use concise examples and minimal fixtures when discussing issues or improvements.
